channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sign damaged at base., 16th July
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown shrubbery, 16th July
item.description:
It has been like this for months and I have reported it before to no avail

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire Risk - dry grass cuttings and logs pile, 16th July
item.description:
Kevyn Wightman LBB tree officer has requetsed this pile is cleared asap - there are 2 places: What3words locations below ///betsar.sparats.fnittra ///yrka.hamnar.blekt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Priory Avenue, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo bags, 16th July
item.description:
Over the past month or numerous dog poo bags are being left on the pavement and by the kerb road side. I have no photos as today the street cleaner collected these and I asked how to report the problem. He advised on line.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees, 16th July
item.description:
Height of trees to rear of 10 Powys Close, Branches occasionally fall into garden & cause problems for removal, as are too large for our Council garden bin & we are unable to cut them down to size ourselves. In autumn large amounts of debris needs removal which is causing us hardship now owing to ill health & old age. We like to use our garden as a form of exercise to walk around the paths as are unable to get out & about easily. We will be in need of a gardener's services soon but do not expect to have to pay for removal of tree rubbish that has not emanated from our property. I am aware of at least 3 other residents that have reported similar problems & perhaps their issues could be linked & dealt with as one request.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Powys Close, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 16th July
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the back entrance between Woodlands Avenue DA15 8HA and Wincham Avenue Sidcup where residents of Woodlands Avenue drive down to their garages it is about half way down. I called to report this Monday 13th July 2026 and again today 16th July 2026 as no one has come and removed the poor animal which has been there since the weekend.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Woodlands Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not on, 16th July
item.description:
PV207 Thats the code for the street light not come on at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redpoll Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement needs sweeping between 77 - 79 Mount Road, 16th July
item.description:
The pavement is covered in stones which are also going into the road and can fly up when cars and buses pass. Please can this be cleared asap. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post by the rounabout overgrowing vegetation from bottom of lamp post, 16th July
item.description:
Resident reporting the lam post by the Ruxley Roundaout has overgrown vegetation growing from underneath it. Crossing the road is difficult and getting dangerous as the growth is coming across the pavement and it is a busy road. Please could someone look into this asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and overgrowth the whole length of road, 16th July
item.description:
This is a recurring problem because if split councils in road. This particular instance was reported months ago and still nothing done. Rubbish is spilling onto road now
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lodge Hill, Welling
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal and dangerous use of motorcycle, 16th July
item.description:
I previously reported the illegal and dangerous use of motorcycles in Riverside Walk, Bexley, a few weeks ago and have not had a response. Today, yet again, motorcycles are being ridden around the public grassy area next to the swing park. I would like to reiterate that access to Riverside Walk is only available to these motorcycles due to the gates at each entrance being inadequate. A car can be driven around the gates easily! Likewise, the fencing separating the park from the private gated lane has long since disappeared and needs reinstating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Dorchester Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Advertising signs, 16th July
item.description:
Advertising sign attached to street lampost

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pound Park Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin at bus stop at junction of Fairway and Tudor Way, 16th July
item.description:
Bin regularly overflows and is surrounded by smelly rubbish. Attracts vermin and is very unpleasant for those waiting at the bus stop and pedestrians. More frequent rubbish collection needed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving slab Belmont Avenue between 32 and side of 48 Ashmore Grove, 16th July
item.description:
There is a rocking paving slab between 32 and side of 48 Ashmore Grove. Walk past the tree, the lamppost and the other tree and the rocking slab appears to be ok but when you tread on it it rocks dangerously and someone could easily fall over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil from a car on road surface & some on pavement outside my property. Debris and the road surface is burnt as the oil was set alight ., 16th July
item.description:
Males seen with car, black truck type vehicle & allegedly ( as witnessed by a neighbour & verbalised by other neighbour) “ changing car engine oil “ then ? Leaked, ? Spilt & then literally set fire to ( again witnessed by a neighbour). Hence damage & debris to road surface. This occurred yesterday, Wednesday 15/7/2026.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Valliers Wood Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporay sign by the ruxley roundabout, 16th July
item.description:
Resident reporting there is a temporary sign near North Cray Road by the Ruxley Rounabout it says "No access to the A20", possibly should read A2. Please could someone look into thisincast it is atyping error on the sign.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush and tree have grown halfway over the path causing people to walk along the kurb, 16th July
item.description:
Someone will get sideswiped by a bus as it is already a narrow path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped in the reserve and lots of littering, 16th July
item.description:
This mattress has been dumped into the reserve for over a year. The litter has been building up over time too.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunsmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping inside Hackney Housing Building problem has been found, 16th July
item.description:
Lot of cat furniture left by communal bins by 6 Selkirk House/
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly Tipping inside Hackney Housing Building

item.title: Dead fox, 16th July
item.description:
Fox cub has been dound dead in my fish pond in the garden. Assumed it fell in and drowned trying to drink not precent when it happed. Animal have been removed and double bagged ready for collection. Please ring door bell.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maybury Close, Petts Wood, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
